guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 40. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ow: Point to the big OW and say: owowow. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ou: Now point to the big OU and say: ououou.

parent_story: An owl flew out of the house. The owl saw a fluffy white cloud.
